item.name: POST /api/auth/login
item.description: Login with email and password to obtain a JWT token.

item.name: POST /api/auth/register
item.description: Register a new user and send OTP verification.

item.name: POST /api/auth/signup
item.description: Alias for register; creates a pending user with OTP verification.

item.name: POST /api/auth/verify-otp
item.description: Verify OTP to activate a pending user account.

item.name: POST /api/auth/resend-otp
item.description: Resend the OTP for a pending user.

item.name: POST /api/auth/logout
item.description: Invalidate the current session and clear the auth cookie.

item.name: GET /api/auth/me
item.description: Fetch the current user profile from the token.

item.name: GET /api/products
item.description: List products with pagination and search.

item.name: GET /api/products/{{productId}}
item.description: Get a single product by id.

item.name: GET /api/customers
item.description: List customers with pagination and search.

item.name: GET /api/customers/{{customerId}}
item.description: Get a single customer by id.

item.name: GET /api/suppliers
item.description: List suppliers with pagination and search.

item.name: GET /api/suppliers/{{supplierId}}
item.description: Get a single supplier by id.

item.name: GET /api/purchase-orders
item.description: List purchase orders with pagination and search.

item.name: GET /api/purchase-orders/{{purchaseOrderId}}
item.description: Get a single purchase order by id.

item.name: PUT /api/purchase-orders/{{purchaseOrderId}}
item.description: Update purchase order status or items.

item.name: DELETE /api/purchase-orders/{{purchaseOrderId}}
item.description: Delete a purchase order by id.

item.name: GET /api/sales-orders
item.description: List sales orders with pagination and search.

item.name: GET /api/sales-orders/{{salesOrderId}}
item.description: Get a single sales order by id.

item.name: PUT /api/sales-orders/{{salesOrderId}}
item.description: Update sales order status or items.

item.name: DELETE /api/sales-orders/{{salesOrderId}}
item.description: Delete a sales order by id.

item.name: POST /api/grn
item.description: Create a GRN for a purchase order.

item.name: PUT /api/grn/{{grnId}}
item.description: Update a GRN record by id.

item.name: GET /api/invoices
item.description: List invoices with pagination and search.
